TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Coverage from the final on the seventh day of the tournament, which takes place in Yushan, China. Scotland's John Higgins won his fifth World Open title last year after he defeated England's Joe O'Connor 10-6 in the final. His fifth triumph came 21 years after his first success in 1994 and was the first time he'd won the event since 2008. It meant that O'Connor had lost his second ranking final in a row after defeat by Gary Wilson in the 2022 Scottish Open.

The visitors will be looking to end the series on a high and gain revenge after a hammering by the Kiwi's in the semi-finals of the T20 World Cup at the start of the month. Finn Allen hit a record-breaking 33-ball hundred to lead New Zealand to a nine-wicket victory and their second T20 final inside five years.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.subtitle: Murder She Wrote: The Kouri Richins Trial
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: The shocking story of Utah mom Kouri Richins, accused of poisoning her husband and then writing a children's book about grief; the verdict in the case; statements from Kouri's closest friend and the jury foreperson in her case.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.subtitle: Murder at the U

HBO.East.us2.title: The Town
HBO.East.us2.description: Doug MacRay leads a band of ruthless bank robbers and has no real attachments except for James, who -- despite his dangerous temper -- is like a brother. Everything changes for Doug when James briefly takes a hostage, bank employee Claire Keesey. Learning that she lives in the gang's neighborhood, Doug seeks her out to discover what she knows, and he falls in love. As the romance deepens, he wants out of his criminal life, but that could threaten Claire.

HBO.East.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.East.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.East.us2.title: Sunshine Cleaning
HBO.East.us2.description: Though they once seemed to have a bright future, life seems to be passing by the Norkowski sisters. Rose (Amy Adams), once the most popular girl in high school, is a single mom and works as a maid. Norah (Emily Blunt) still lives at home with their father (Alan Arkin) and parties all the time. When Rose's married lover tells her about the lucrative field of crime-scene cleanup, she pours all her remaining resources into her new business, and recruits the squeamish Norah to help.

HBO.East.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Lola Versus
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Just three weeks before her wedding, Lola (Greta Gerwig) finds herself suddenly without a partner when her longtime fiancé, Luke (Joel Kinnaman), dumps her. With her 30th birthday looming and being forced to re-enter the New York City dating scene, she feels adrift in a cold world. She leans on her friends (Zoe Lister-Jones, Hamish Linklater) for support but, after a series of romantic humiliations, professional blunders and boozy antics, Lola realizes that she alone is in charge of her fate.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Brick Mansions
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian Detroit, grand houses that once housed the wealthy are now homes of the city's most-dangerous criminals. Surrounding the area is a giant wall to keep the rest of Detroit safe. For undercover cop Damien Collier (Paul Walker), every day is a battle against corruption as he struggles to bring his father's killer, Tremaine (RZA), to justice. Meanwhile, Damien and an ex-con named Lino (David Belle) work together to save the city from a plot to destroy it.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Dune

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Dune: Part Two
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Enemy

Wilbur), who is targeting Tommy Doyle (Paul Stephen Rudd), a young man tied into the legacy of the killer and his connections with the Strode family. As the supernatural elements of Michael's macabre abilities are explored, his longtime adversary, Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), is also back in yet another attempt to stop the psychopath's brutal rampages.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Brutalist

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Wilson

Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Women Is Losers

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Spectacular Now

While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl

Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

In retaliation, the crone places a curse on Christine, threatening her soul with eternal damnation. Christine seeks a psychic's help to break the curse, but the price to save her soul may be more than she can pay.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Terminator
HBO.West.us2.description: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against them. With the virtually unstoppable Terminator in hot pursuit, she and Kyle attempt to escape.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Town
HBO.West.us2.description: Doug MacRay leads a band of ruthless bank robbers and has no real attachments except for James, who -- despite his dangerous temper -- is like a brother. Everything changes for Doug when James briefly takes a hostage, bank employee Claire Keesey. Learning that she lives in the gang's neighborhood, Doug seeks her out to discover what she knows, and he falls in love. As the romance deepens, he wants out of his criminal life, but that could threaten Claire.

HBO.West.us2.description: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

HBO.West.us2.title: Flow
HBO.West.us2.description: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

HBO.West.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.West.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.West.us2.title: Sunshine Cleaning
HBO.West.us2.description: Though they once seemed to have a bright future, life seems to be passing by the Norkowski sisters. Rose (Amy Adams), once the most popular girl in high school, is a single mom and works as a maid. Norah (Emily Blunt) still lives at home with their father (Alan Arkin) and parties all the time. When Rose's married lover tells her about the lucrative field of crime-scene cleanup, she pours all her remaining resources into her new business, and recruits the squeamish Norah to help.

As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

HBO.West.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

When Peter finds a mysterious briefcase that was his father's, he pursues a quest to solve his parents' disappearance. His search takes him to Oscorp and the lab of Dr. Curt Connors, setting him on a collision course with Connors' alter ego, the Lizard.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: After a quick courtship, two lovers decide to tie the knot. As their first year of marriage unfolds, temptation and incompatibility put their relationship in jeopardy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Mom and Dad Save the World
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: While planning to destroy Earth with a gigantic laser beam, Emperor Tod Spengo (Jon Lovitz), ruler of the planet Spengo, catches a glimpse of housewife Marge Nelson (Teri Garr) and becomes smitten with her. Beaming Marge and her husband, Dick (Jeffrey Jones), up to Spengo from California, the daft, dimwitted leader tries to woo her, and sends her spouse to prison. Soon Dick is plotting an insurgency, in hopes of overthrowing Spengo and rescuing his wife.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: It's Complicated
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Jane (Meryl Streep), a successful restaurateur, has been divorced from Jake (Alec Baldwin) for many years, although they remain friends. When an innocent meal together turns into an affair, Jane finds that she is the other woman in the now-remarried Jake's life. Meanwhile, Adam (Steve Martin), an architect hired to remodel her kitchen, is still stinging from his own divorce. He finds himself falling in love with Jane but soon realizes that he has become part of a triangle.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wilson
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

ACC.Network.us2.title: ACC Network Football Podcast
ACC.Network.us2.description: This podcast covers all things ACC football. Hosted by first round NFL Draft pick and former Florida State quarterback EJ Manuel and former Georgia Tech running back Roddy Jones.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 1 (1954-1957)
ACC.Network.us2.description: When Indiana native Everett Case arrives in Raleigh to become the coach at North Carolina State, his vision spearheads not just the rise of college basketball at his school and in the region, but the start of a conference that will change the sport.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 2 (1958-1968)
ACC.Network.us2.description: From Frank McGuire to Bones McKinney and Vic Bubas, new coaches emerge to challenge the early success of Everett Case. It all precedes a final poignant moment of triumph for Case at the only home the ACC Tournament has, until this point, ever known.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 3 (1966-1972)
ACC.Network.us2.description: After a rough start, North Carolina's Dean Smith comes to be known for both dominance and dignity, playing a central role in desegregating the ACC with the recruitment of Charlie Scott, who emerges as a star on some of Smith's greatest teams.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 4 (1973-1974)
ACC.Network.us2.description: An intense and high-impact rivalry develops between Maryland and North Carolina State, capped by the finale of the 1974 ACC Tournament in arguably the greatest college basketball game ever - and a battle that helps shape the future of the sport.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 5 (1975-1980)
ACC.Network.us2.description: Dean Smith's North Carolina teams may be the class of the ACC, but rivals also flourish, including a Virginia team led by Wally Walker, and a Duke program that re-emerges with a championship run in 1978 and a controversial title two years later.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 6 (1981-1983)
ACC.Network.us2.description: Virginia's Ralph Sampson earns national player of the year honors three times, but never wins the ACC Tournament. Dean Smith seeks a title with freshman Michael Jordan, and the charismatic Jim Valvano leads NC State on a memorable Cinderella run.

AMC.HD.us2.title: I, Robot
AMC.HD.us2.description: In 2035, highly intelligent robots fill public service positions throughout the world, operating under three rules to keep humans safe. Despite his dark history with robotics, Detective Del Spooner (Will Smith) investigates the alleged suicide of U.S. Robotics founder Alfred Lanning (James Cromwell) and believes that a human-like robot (Alan Tudyk) murdered him. With the help of a robot expert (Bridget Moynahan), Spooner discovers a conspiracy that may enslave the human race.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Constantine
AMC.HD.us2.description: As a suicide survivor, demon hunter John Constantine (Keanu Reeves) has literally been to hell and back -- and he knows that when he dies, he's got a one-way ticket to Satan's realm unless he can earn enough goodwill to climb God's stairway to heaven. While helping policewoman Angela Dodson (Rachel Weisz) investigate her identical twin's apparent suicide, Constantine becomes caught up in a supernatural plot involving both demonic and angelic forces. Based on the DC/Vertigo "Hellblazer" comics.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Pulp Fiction
AMC.HD.us2.description: Vincent Vega (John Travolta) and Jules Winnfield (Samuel L. Jackson) are hitmen with a penchant for philosophical discussions. In this ultra-hip, multi-strand crime movie, their storyline is interwoven with those of their boss, gangster Marsellus Wallace (Ving Rhames) ; his actress wife, Mia (Uma Thurman) ; struggling boxer Butch Coolidge (Bruce Willis) ; master fixer Winston Wolfe (Harvey Keitel) and a nervous pair of armed robbers, "Pumpkin" (Tim Roth) and "Honey Bunny" (Amanda Plummer).

AMC.HD.us2.title: Independence Day
AMC.HD.us2.description: In the epic adventure film "Independence Day," strange phenomena surface around the globe. The skies ignite. Terror races through the world's major cities. As these extraordinary events unfold, it becomes increasingly clear that a force of incredible magnitude has arrived; its mission: total annihilation over the Fourth of July weekend. The last hope to stop the destruction is an unlikely group of people united by fate and unimaginable circumstances.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Bad Boys
AMC.HD.us2.description: Miami-Dade detectives Mike Lowrey (Will Smith) and Marcus Burnett (Martin Lawrence) blow a fuse when $100 million worth of heroin they recently confiscated is heisted from station headquarters. Suspecting it was an inside job, Internal Affairs gives them five days to track down the drugs before they shut down the narcotics division. Action meets farce when Marcus is compelled to masquerade as his partner in order to gain the trust of a call girl (Tea Leoni), a key witness in their investigation.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Bad Boys II
AMC.HD.us2.description: The drug ecstasy is flowing into Miami, and the police want it stopped. Police Detective Marcus Burnett and his partner, Mike Lowrey, are just the men to do it. They track the drugs to a Cuban smuggler, Johnny Tapia, who is also involved in a bloody war with Russian and Haitian mobsters. If that isn't bad enough, there's tension between the two cops because Lowrey is romantically involved with Burnett's sister, Syd.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard 2
AMC.HD.us2.description: A year after his heroics in L.A., detective John McClane (Bruce Willis) is mixed up in another terrorist plot, this time at Washington Dulles International Airport, where he is waiting for his wife (Bonnie Bedelia). That same night, South American politico and drug profiteer Ramon Esperanza (Franco Nero) is arriving in U.S. custody. McClane takes action when a treasonous ex-colonel (William Sadler) seizes control of the airport, threatening to crash every inbound flight unless Esperanza is freed.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard
AMC.HD.us2.description: New York City policeman John McClane is visiting his estranged wife and two daughters on Christmas Eve. He joins her at a holiday party in the headquarters of the Japanese-owned business she works for. But the festivities are interrupted by a group of terrorists who take over the exclusive high-rise, and everyone in it. Very soon McClane realizes that there's no one to save the hostages -- but him.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Dark Winds
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Shíká Nidanitáhą́ą́ (Those Who Were Searching for Me)
AMC.HD.us2.description: When Chee's new intel provides a clue to Vaggan's identity, Leaphorn enlists the FBI to help ambush the killer; Manuelito and Emma help Chee with his recovery from a close call while he is haunted by a specter from his past.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Tombstone
AMC.HD.us2.description: Wyatt Earp and his brothers, Morgan and Virgil, have left their gunslinger ways behind them to settle down and start a business in the town of Tombstone, Ariz. While they aren't looking to find trouble, trouble soon finds them when they become targets of the ruthless Cowboy gang. Now, together with Wyatt's best friend, Doc Holliday, the brothers pick up their guns once more to restore order to a lawless land.

In 2011, mankind learns the truth the hard way when alien invaders attack. One by one, the world's great cities fall, leaving Los Angeles as the battleground for humanity's last stand. It's up to a Marine staff sergeant (Aaron Eckhart) and his platoon to draw a line in the sand against a powerful enemy unlike any previously encountered.

AMC.HD.us2.title: London Has Fallen
AMC.HD.us2.description: After the death of the British prime minister, the world's most powerful leaders gather in London to pay their respects. Without warning, terrorists unleash a devastating attack that leaves the city in chaos and ruins. Secret Service agent Mike Banning (Gerard Butler) springs into action to bring U.S. President Benjamin Asher (Aaron Eckhart) to safety. When Asher falls into the hands of the sinister organization, it's up to Banning to save his commander in chief from a horrible fate.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Italian Job
AMC.HD.us2.description: After a heist in Venice, Steve turns on his partners in crime, killing safecracker John Bridger and keeping all the gold for himself; the rest of the team, including leader Charlie Croker, driver Handsome Rob, explosives man Left Ear and tech geek Lyle, vows revenge; they enlist the help of Bridger's daughter, Stella and plot to recover the gold from Steve's Los Angeles mansion.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Olympus Has Fallen
AMC.HD.us2.description: The unthinkable happens when heavily armed and highly trained terrorists launch a bold daytime attack on the White House. The building is overrun, and President Benjamin Asher (Aaron Eckhart) and his staff are taken hostage. Luckily for Asher, former presidential security officer Mike Banning (Gerard Butler) is on the scene. With time running out, it's up to Banning to locate Asher's son before the extremists do and rescue the president before his captors unleash their ultimate plan.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Law Abiding Citizen
AMC.HD.us2.description: Clyde Shelton is an honorable family man, until the day his wife and daughter are murdered in a home invasion. He hopes for justice, but a rising prosecutor named Nick Rice cuts a deal with one of the killers in exchange for testimony. Ten years later, that man is found dead.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Mechanic: Resurrection
AMC.HD.us2.description: Living undercover in Brazil, master assassin Arthur Bishop (Jason Statham) springs back into action after an old enemy (Sam Hazeldine) kidnaps the woman (Jessica Alba) he loves. To save her life, Bishop must kill an imprisoned African warlord, a human trafficker (Toby Eddington) and an arms dealer (Tommy Lee Jones), all while making the deaths look like accidents. When things don't go exactly as planned, Bishop turns the tables on the people who forced him out of retirement.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Enemy of the State
AMC.HD.us2.description: Corrupt National Security Agency official Thomas Reynolds (Jon Voight) has a congressman assassinated to assure the passage of expansive new surveillance legislation. With the help of ex-intelligence agent Edward "Brill" Lyle (Gene Hackman), Dean attempts to throw Reynolds off his trail and prove his innocence.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunt for Red October
AMC.HD.us2.description: Based on the popular Tom Clancy novel, this suspenseful movie tracks Soviet submarine captain Marko Ramius as he abandons his orders and heads for the east coast of the United States. Equipped with innovative stealth technology, Ramius' submarine, "Red October," is virtually invisible. However, when an American sub briefly detects the Russians' presence, CIA agent Jack Ryan sets out to determine Ramius' motives, fearing he may launch an attack on the U.S.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Levante-Oviedo
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Espanyol-Getafe
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Especiales LaLiga EA Sports fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Sevilla-Valencia
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Dos grandes de la historia del fútbol español en apuros. Temporada difícil para los de Almeyda y para los de Corberán. La salvación es el objetivo, pero aún quedan muchos puntos en disputa y cada resultado cuenta. La presión crece para los dos equipos.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Real Madrid-Atlético de Madrid

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Todos los goles y Asistencias de Lamine Yamal en LaLiga EA Sports.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Racing - Albacete
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Sardinero eleva el voltaje: Racing fuerte en duelos, centros al segundo palo y transiciones rápidas. El Alba buscará pausa y claridad entre líneas; si compite rechaces y ajusta el balón parado, puede sostener un partido de marcador corto.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Andorra - Eibar
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Andorra intentará gobernar con posesiones largas y pasillos interiores, cuidando la pérdida para evitar transiciones. El Eibar sube el ritmo con presión y centros laterales; la eficacia en el último pase y el balón parado pueden romper el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Mirandés - Valladolid
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Anduva favorece el ida y vuelta: Mirandés intenso tras robo y con llegada por fuera. El Valladolid intentará gobernar desde banda y centros tensos; la gestión de pérdidas y las segundas jugadas marcarán el resultado.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Especiales LaLiga fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Real Sociedad B - Granada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Real B quiere continuidad con balón y presión tras pérdida para instalarse arriba sin desordenarse. El Granada busca verticalidad y pegada; si domina las áreas y la estrategia, puede inclinar un partido muy táctico.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Burgos - Córdoba
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Plantío es fortín: Burgos cómodo en duelos, rechaces y centros laterales para sostener el partido en mínimos. El Córdoba buscará amplitud y diagonales; quien controle segundas jugadas y balón parado tendrá ventaja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Las Palmas - Sporting
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La UD pretende imponer paciencia con balón y último pase para someter en campo rival. El Sporting buscará ritmo por fuera y carga del área; si Las Palmas resiste el primer empuje, el partido puede decidirse en detalle y estrategia.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Especiales LaLiga fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Castellón - Cultural
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Castalia cierra la jornada con un Castellón que empuja por fuera y llega con varios al remate. La Cultural propone circulación y cambios de ritmo; el control de transiciones y la eficacia en el área definirán el cierre.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Racing - Albacete
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Sardinero eleva el voltaje: Racing fuerte en duelos, centros al segundo palo y transiciones rápidas. El Alba buscará pausa y claridad entre líneas; si compite rechaces y ajusta el balón parado, puede sostener un partido de marcador corto.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Fase de grupos
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Brunete (Madrid) acoge la primera edición del Mundial sub12 del 25 al 29 de marzo. Este torneo reúne a 20 clubes de élite de cinco continentes que lucharán por alzarse con el triunfo.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Eredivisie
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Feyenoord Rotterdam – Ajax Amsterdam (28. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: In der höchsten Spielklasse des niederländischen Fußballs treten 18 Mannschaften an 34 Spieltagen gegeneinander an. Dabei dominieren die Vereine Ajax Amsterdam, PSV Eindhoven und Feyenoord Rotterdam. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Primeira Liga
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: FC Alverca – Sporting Lissabon (27. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Willkommen zur höchsten Spielklasse im portugiesischen Männerfußball. Eine Saison erstreckt sich über 34 Spieltage, wobei die Partien von Mitte August bis Ende Mai oder Anfang Juni ausgetragen werden. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Liga Profesional
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Boca Juniors – Instituto AC Cordoba (12. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Vorhang auf zur höchsten Spielklasse des argentinischen Fußballs: Die Primera División wurde 1985 als Nachfolger des Campeonato de Primera División und des Torneo Metropolitano gegründet. 24 Vereine sind in der Liga vertreten. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Im Rampenlicht – Footballs Greatest Stage
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Ronaldo
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Große Turniere wie Welt- und Europameisterschaften, aber auch die Champions League oder der UEFA-Cup sind ideale Bühnen, auf denen sich Fußballspieler einen Namen machen, und ihren Marktwert steigern können. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Fluminense – Atletico Mineiro (8. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Brasilianer spielen den attraktivsten Fußball. Will man die Pelés von morgen sehen, lohnt sich ein Blick auf die nationale Meisterschaft. Die Sendung zeigt die wichtigsten Spiele der aktuellen Saison. (Senderinfo).

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Evloev vs. Murphy - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The next title challenger in the UFC featherweight division could be determined when the Octagon makes its return to The O2 Arena in London, England on Saturday, March 22 as undefeated contenders Movsar Evloev and Lerone “The Miracle” Murphy clash in the main event. Sporting a 9-0 record in the UFC and a 19-0 mark overall, Evloev competes for the first time since besting former bantamweight titleholder Aljamain Sterling and holds additional wins over the likes of Diego Lopes, Arnold Allen and Dan Ige.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns to Meta APEX on Saturday, March 15 with an exciting event headlined by a critical featherweight matchup between tenured veteran Josh “CC0” Emmett and ascending Argentinian Kevin “El Chino” Vallejos. Emmett has been a mainstay in the Top 10 for several years, earning victories over the likes of Ricardo Lamas, Dan Ige and Bryce Mitchell along with challenging for the interim featherweight title at UFC 284.

Plus a whole lot more action on UFC Reloaded

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 5
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 20
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns to Meta APEX on Saturday, March 15 with an exciting event headlined by a critical featherweight matchup between tenured veteran Josh “CC0” Emmett and ascending Argentinian Kevin “El Chino” Vallejos. Emmett has been a mainstay in the Top 10 for several years, earning victories over the likes of Ricardo Lamas, Dan Ige and Bryce Mitchell along with challenging for the interim featherweight title at UFC 284.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 6
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 1
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - 1101 - Gaethje vs Holloway
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 300 was not only a milestone event for the world's leading MMA organization but featured a highly anticipated bout between Justin Gaethje and Max Holloway as they battled for the “BMF” belt and the title of the “baddest” fighter on the planet. See their fight like never seen before with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Connected - 803 - UFC Connected "origins: Randy Brown, Locked In: Ailin Perez, Fighting For Change: Ode Osbourne
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Randy Brown unveils the hardships of his turbulent upbringing in Spanish Town, Jamaica, and his remarkable rise to the pinnacle of MMA. Argentinian Ailin Perez opens up about her fierce drive for competition in the UFC Women's Bantamweight Division. Ode Osbourne participates in a youth mentorship program, where he delivers an impactful message to the SASA Squad Foundation.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Main Event - UFC 290: Moreno vs Pantoja 2
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: At UFC 290, Brandon Moreno faced the toughest test of his championship reign in a rematch against Alexandre Pantoja. See both athletes train and prepare ahead of their bout on this episode of UFC Main Event.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Unleashed - 1803 - Lightweight Title
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When Khabib Nurmagomedov retired from MMA, the UFC's lightweight title was up for grabs. See the journey of the 155-pound belt following the Khabib Era on UFC Unleashed. Featuring Charles Oliveira, Dustin Poirier, Islam Makhachev, and more.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Evloev vs. Murphy - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The next title challenger in the UFC featherweight division could be determined when the Octagon makes its return to The O2 Arena in London, England on Saturday, March 22 as undefeated contenders Movsar Evloev and Lerone “The Miracle” Murphy clash in the main event. Sporting a 9-0 record in the UFC and a 19-0 mark overall, Evloev competes for the first time since besting former bantamweight titleholder Aljamain Sterling and holds additional wins over the likes of Diego Lopes, Arnold Allen and Dan Ige.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 325: Volkanovski vs. Lopes 2 - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: On Sunday, February 1, UFC returns to Sydney Olympic Park, New South Wales, Australia for UFC 325 which will be headlined by a featherweight championship rematch between titleholder Alexander “The Great” Volkanovski and challenger Diego Lopes. The duo faced off for the vacant featherweight title last April at UFC 314 in Miami, with Volkanovski earning a unanimous decision victory to reclaim in the throne in the 145-pound weight class.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) UFC Fight Night: Adesanya vs. Pyfer - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When the UFC returns to Climate Pledge Arena in Seattle, Washington on Saturday, March 29, it brings with it a combustible middleweight main event pitting two-time former champion Israel “The Last Stylebender” Adesanya against ascending American Joe “Bodybagz” Pyfer. Inducted into the Fight Wing of the UFC Hall of Fame last summer, Adesanya is the only man to hold the UFC middleweight title twice, amassing victories over the likes of Robert Whittaker, Paulo Costa, Jared Cannonier and Alex Pereira during the course of his illustrious career.
